question: Is the image an overhead (top-down) realistic photograph of a tabletop scene?
Are there exactly five boxes arranged in a single horizontal row from left to right?
Are the five boxes open (interiors visible) and visually identical in shape and size?
Do the boxes have clean exteriors with no markings, labels, or decorations?
Does each box contain exactly one item (no empty boxes and no multiple items per box)?
Are all five specific items present exactly once in the scene: a candle, a key, a feather, a seashell, and a coin?
Is the Coin placed in the center box (the 3rd box from the left)?
Is the Seashell placed in the box immediately to the right of the Coin (the 4th box from the left)?
Is the Feather placed in the leftmost box (the 1st box from the left)?
Is the Key placed in the 2nd box from the left (positioned between the Feather and the Coin)?
Is the Candle placed in the rightmost box (the 5th box from the left)?
Is the complete order of items from left to right: Feather, Key, Coin, Seashell, Candle?
Does the Coin visually look like a real coin (round metallic disc with relief details)?
Does the Seashell visually look like a real shell (spiral or ridged structure)?
Does the Candle visually look like a real small candle (cylindrical wax body with a wick)?
Does the Feather visually look like a real feather (central shaft with barbs/vanes)?
Does the Key visually look like a real key (metallic object with teeth/bit and a bow/handle)?
Is the image free of any text, numbers, logos, watermarks, or branding?
